perf_hint: two lattice layers per pixel and no textures — among the cheapest presets; the resolution is the only cost

params.name: density
params.description: How much dust hangs in the air.

params.name: size
params.description: How wide a mote is, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: drift
params.description: How fast the dust crosses the frame.

params.name: heading
params.description: Which way the dust drifts, in turns; 0 is rightward.

params.name: twinkle
params.description: How much the air band glints the motes.

params.name: tint
params.description: How much of the palette colors the dust; 0 is plain daylight.

params.name: glow
params.description: How far the faint halo around each mote reaches.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the song lifts into the dust.
